_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PTERODACTYL PANEL - PTERODACTYL.IO
name: SpongeVanilla
author: parker@parkervcp.com
description: SpongeVanilla is the implementation of the Sponge API on top of Vanilla Minecraft.

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
# SpongeVanilla Installation Script
#
# Server Files: /mnt/server
set -Eeuo pipefail

apt-get update
apt-get install -y curl jq unzip

mkdir -p /mnt/server
cd /mnt/server

SERVER_JARFILE="${SERVER_JARFILE:-server.jar}"
SV_VERSION="${SV_VERSION:-recommended}"

if [[ "${SERVER_JARFILE}" != *.jar ]]; then
    SERVER_JARFILE="${SERVER_JARFILE}.jar"
fi

API_ROOT="https://dl-api.spongepowered.org/v1/org.spongepowered/spongevanilla"

case "${SV_VERSION}" in
    recommended)
        METADATA="$(curl -fsSL --retry 3 --retry-all-errors --connect-timeout 15 --max-time 120 "${API_ROOT}/downloads/recommended")"
        SV_VERSION="$(jq -er '.version' <<< "${METADATA}")"
        SV_DL_LINK="$(jq -er '.artifacts[""].url' <<< "${METADATA}")"
        ;;
    latest)
        PROJECT="$(curl -fsSL --retry 3 --retry-all-errors --connect-timeout 15 --max-time 120 "${API_ROOT}")"
        SV_VERSION="$(jq -er '.buildTypes.stable.latest.version' <<< "${PROJECT}")"
        METADATA="$(curl -fsSL --retry 3 --retry-all-errors --connect-timeout 15 --max-time 120 "${API_ROOT}/downloads/${SV_VERSION}")"
        SV_DL_LINK="$(jq -er '.artifacts[""].url' <<< "${METADATA}")"
        ;;
    *)
        SV_DL_LINK="https://repo.spongepowered.org/repository/maven-releases/org/spongepowered/spongevanilla/${SV_VERSION}/spongevanilla-${SV_VERSION}-universal.jar"
        ;;
esac

echo "Downloading SpongeVanilla ${SV_VERSION}"
echo "Source: ${SV_DL_LINK}"

TEMP_JAR="${SERVER_JARFILE}.download"
rm -f "${TEMP_JAR}"

curl -fL --retry 3 --retry-all-errors --connect-timeout 15 --max-time 300 "${SV_DL_LINK}" -o "${TEMP_JAR}"

if [[ ! -s "${TEMP_JAR}" ]]; then
    echo "ERROR: SpongeVanilla download produced an empty file."
    exit 1
fi

if ! unzip -p "${TEMP_JAR}" META-INF/MANIFEST.MF | grep -q '^Main-Class:'; then
    echo "ERROR: Downloaded JAR is not executable; Main-Class is missing."
    exit 1
fi

mv -f "${TEMP_JAR}" "${SERVER_JARFILE}"

if [[ ! -f server.properties ]]; then
    curl -fL --retry 3 --retry-all-errors --connect-timeout 15 --max-time 120 https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ptero-eggs/game-eggs/main/minecraft/java/server.properties -o server.properties
fi

echo "SpongeVanilla ${SV_VERSION} installed successfully as ${SERVER_JARFILE}"

variables.name: SpongeVanilla Version
variables.description:
Example 1.12.2-7.1.6

If the version fails it defaults to recommended

variables.name: Server Jar File
variables.description: The name of the Jarfile to use when running Mod.
